title: Conversation Instruction Compiler Sample
why_it_exists: Demonstrates generated surfaces as plain-language conversation instruction compilers, not dashboards.
interaction_model: Buttons display/copy command envelopes and plain-language instructions; no direct DB/API/canonical mutation.
plain_language_instruction_template: Tell LUCIDOTA to {action} target {target_refs} using evidence {evidence_refs} and artifact refs {artifact_refs}. Current state: {current_object_state}. Allowed effect: {allowed_effect}.
